title: Remove SVG icon from header button

requirements.summary: Remove the SVG icon element from the first button in the Navbar component's header top-left area while keeping the button itself intact
acceptanceCriteria: The SVG icon previously inside the header button at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/button[1]/span[1]/svg[1] is no longer rendered
No broken layout or empty space is introduced where the SVG was
The rest of the Navbar remains visually and functionally unchanged

file_operations.description: Locate the first button element in the header's top-left area and remove its inner SVG icon element. If the SVG is wrapped in a span element that becomes empty after removal, remove that span as well. Preserve the button element itself and all its attributes, event handlers, and styling. Ensure no broken layout or empty space remains where the SVG was located.
